egress_attempts: go version 2>/dev/null; echo "---tilt version---"; grep -i "version" pkg/model/build.go 2>/dev/null | head; cat version/version.txt 2>/dev/null; git log -1 --format=%ci; echo "---try net---"; timeout

cd /tmp && timeout 60 bash -c 'GOFLAGS=-mod=mod go mod download github.com/tilt-dev/tilt@latest 2>&1 | head; ls $(go env GOMODCACHE)/github.com/tilt-dev/ 2>/dev/null' || echo "fail"; echo "==try git c

cd /work; sed -n '30,60p' web/src/AppController.ts; echo "=== other fetch/api calls in web ==="; grep -rn "fetch(\|/api/\|/proxy" web/src/*.ts web/src/*.tsx 2>/dev/null | grep -i "fetch\|http://\|http
